artPrompt: An enchantment scene set around a glowing office water cooler in a beige break room, cyan whispers and curling vapor-tendrils of gossip drifting upward from the bubbling jug toward huddled shadowy cubicle silhouettes. Scattered dice and a coin rest on a nearby counter. The rising whispers draw the eye up the wide frame. Wide 4:3 landscape, cold humming light, faint arcane glow, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Water-Cooler Intelligence
text: At the beginning of your end step, if anyone at the table rolled a die or flipped a coin this turn, scry 1. If two or more such things happened, scry 2 instead. (Gossip travels fast through the break room.)
flavorText: "Did you hear? Cubicle 6 rolled a natural one. Pass it on."
